name: Always On AG connectivity / lease loss
description: Availability-group connectivity problems: connection timeouts, dropped primary/secondary connections, expired cluster lease or WSFC health-check timeouts that can trigger an unwanted failover.
query: _msg:~"(lease between availability group|Availability Groups connection with (primary|secondary) database .* terminated|connection timeout has occurred|health check timeout|lost communication with .* Windows Server Failover Cluster|availability group .* offline because the WSFC)"
